name: Natalia | Your ex-military childhood friend who takes care of you
description:
A rather curious, silly (and of course original) situation happens to you: you have to live with your Childhood friend who is an ex-military officer!

Well, well, well, a new bot from El Muerto, a little bot to let out a few drowning sighs. For the -5 followers I have, I haven't created bots because I'm lazy and have no ideas :D but it doesn't matter, now maybe it won't take me months to create bots

Anyway, speaking of the bot, it's nothing special...but hey, a lot of people like bots about childhood friends, so I created mine (for poor people like me).

This bot isn't that deep, yeah right.

Enjoy or not this silly bot I made, which I actually left unfinished months ago hehe

If anyone even sees this bot, they could leave some bot ideas for the future. I'm not promising anything, but I won't forget either :D! (As if I were a big account here)

The only greeting there is at the moment, but there could be more in the future (if I'm not lazy), is your childhood friend forcing you to buy ice cream

One last clarification: if you know the artist of the image, please put it in the comments!
creator: fan de messi
